description.overview: The Cane Corso is a large Italian mastiff breed known for its protective instincts and impressive physique.
description.temperament: Corsos are intelligent and trainable but need experienced handling. Loyal and protective of family.
description.health: Prone to hip dysplasia, bloat, and eye problems. Regular health screening important.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs but requires mental stimulation. Daily walks and play sessions.

verdict.summary: A noble Italian guardian breed. Cane Corsos are intelligent and loyal but need experienced owners who can provide firm, consistent training.
